The final mirror will instead inflict $317589s1 Shadow damage to the enemy, Rooting and Silencing them for $317589d.
Whenever a mirror is consumed $?c1[you gain Clearcasting][]$?c2[your Fire Blast cooldown is reduced by $s2 sec][]$?c3[you gain Brain Freeze][].
